fan_out.axis_a: per-raw landing-strategy enumeration: 10 airgenome-DIRECT raws × 6 mandatory fields (raw_concept, landing_primary, landing_secondary, reproducer_pointer, tracking_id, witness_cycle_handle) = 60 cells. Each row independently authored from raw concept + airgenome dir survey (modules/ + core/ + filters/{data,process,transport}); rows do not derive from one another.
fan_out.axis_b: cross-cutting pattern anchor matrix: 5 falsifier themes (counterfactual_twin r120, info_theoretic_bound r111, anti_fragility r115, bayesian_evidence r113, persistent_homology r122) × 8 module targets (probe, label, forecast, genome_merge, core/core, dispatch, harvest, predictive_throttle) × 3 dir-pressure rows (modules/+5, forge/+0, core/+0). Aggregates raw-level decisions into directory-pressure forecast. Note: airgenome substitutes persistent_homology (r122) for bisimulation (r114=META in airgenome col).
fan_out.axis_c: honesty disclosure layer: 5 honesty_* claims (no_implementation_in_this_cycle, tracking_ids_are_placeholder, landing_surface_existence_audit, meta_raw_exclusion, na_raw_exclusion) each grounded in file:line citation. Independent of axis_a content (axis_a tells you WHAT to land, axis_c tells you WHAT WAS NOT done this cycle and WHY claims are not fabricated). +1 honesty_dir_creation entry for the bootstrap mkdir.
fan_out.axis_d: META+NA-raw exclusion rationale (tri-partition extension): 6 raws (112,114,117,118,124,126) have airgenome=META, 2 raws (116,121) have airgenome=NA. Both classes explicitly enumerated and rejected from this propagation plan with reasoning. META = lateral inheritance from primary-landing project. NA = airgenome 6-axis hexagon model does not naturally express the concept (attractor-geometry needs state-space sampling, reservoir-capacity needs continuous dynamical-system primitive — both absent from airgenome's discrete 60-byte genome model). Tier-1 rejection with reasoning per absorbed-alpha motif (TUI noise-channel anchor witness).
fan_out.correlation_estimate: 0.21 — axis_a vs axis_b correlation: axis_b summarizes axis_a's directory-pressure column, so partial-derivable, but 5×8 falsifier-theme × module-target matrix is genuinely cross-cutting and not a one-to-one pivot of axis_a (modules absorb 1..3 raws each; falsifier themes apply to 1..3 raws each — no clean projection). axis_c independence: honesty layer cannot be derived from axis_a or axis_b without external knowledge of which directories actually exist, which modules are real, which META and NA rows were excluded — these come from filesystem ls + matrix TSV, not from rows. axis_d independence: tri-partition rejection rationale comes from matrix META+NA cells AND airgenome 60-byte hexagon model constraints, NOT from any DIRECT-row content. Correlation slightly higher than anima sister (0.18) because airgenome has fewer DIRECT raws (10 vs 13) → tighter axis_a, slightly more derivable axis_b summary.

obstructions.description: 10 downstream witness cycles are required to actually implement the per-raw landing strategy (each @rN_witness_cycle_handle is a downstream slot). This convergence cycle does not implement; it registers.
obstructions.resolution: carry-forward @cf-1 enumerates 10 downstream cycles; user topic 'WRITE FILE convergence' explicitly requested registration not implementation.

obstructions.description: Airgenome column has 2 NA rows (raws 116, 121) absent in sister anima cycle. Silent exclusion would violate raw 91 C3 honesty; stretch-fit would violate raw 91 C3 fabrication ban.
obstructions.resolution: explicit @honesty_na_raw_exclusion section with per-raw airgenome-specific rationale (r116 attractor-geometry needs state-space sampling, r121 reservoir-capacity needs continuous dynamical-system primitive — both absent from airgenome 6-axis 60-byte hexagon model); axis-5 of axes_surfaced enumerates 4 considered options with rejection rationale.

obstructions.description: Sister anima cycle uses bisimulation (raw 114) as one of 5 cross-cutting falsifier themes; airgenome column has raw 114 = META (not DIRECT), so bisimulation cannot anchor airgenome's cross-cutting theme set.
obstructions.resolution: substituted persistent_homology (raw 122) for bisimulation in airgenome cross_cutting_falsifier_themes; rationale documented in @cross_cutting_falsifier_themes line; cycle preserves 5-theme structure with airgenome-DIRECT-only members.

fixpoint_marker: convergence-r4-raw109to126-airgenome-registration-fixpoint-1 — 10 DIRECT raws registered with landing strategy; 6 META + 2 NA raws explicitly excluded with rationale (tri-partition disclosure); F1..F6 all PASS; tier-1 promotion 1/1; no obstructions blocking. Next fixpoint = first downstream witness cycle (any of the 10 @rN_witness_cycle_handle slots) that implements its raw's primary landing in airgenome modules/.
